name: Zabaykalsky Krai (Russia)

colors.symbolism: the courage of the inhabitants of Transbaikal and the Cossack heritage of the region
the gold of the sun and the krai's mineral wealth

description: A field horizontally divided green over red with a yellow isoceles triangle along the hoist whose apex reaches the centre of the fly side.
history: Adopted on 19 December 2008 by the Legislative Assembly of Zabaykalsky Krai shortly after the krai was formed (1 March 2008) by the merger of Chita Oblast and the Agin-Buryat Autonomous Okrug.

features.symbolism: A horizontally divided field, green over red, with a yellow hoist triangle running the full height
the rising sun over Transbaikal; the gold also recalls the historic Transbaikal Cossack Host
